arts.ttl: Acun Ilicali makes Hull City January transfer guarantee after Ruben Selles statement
arts.sum: Ilicali was speaking alongside new City boss Ruben Selles as the Tigers manager was unveiled to the press at the MKM Stadium. The new City boss has already told sporting director Jared Dublin and the board that he would prefer a smaller squad to work with and with that in mind it is quality rather than quality which the club are aiming for when the window opens in 21 days.

arts.ttl: Watford boss delivers Ruben Selles verdict as Hull City prepare for new era
arts.sum: Cleverley's Hornets have had the benefit of an extra few days preparation after their game at Cardiff City on Saturday fell victim to Storm Darragh, and he's expecting a reaction from the Tigers under a manager he faced in pre-season. Watford head coach Tom Cleverley admits Ruben Selles is a manager who has impressed him as the Hornet's head coach prepares to take on Hull City on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Hull City great makes Tigers vow as new era under head coach Ruben Selles begins
arts.sum: Andy Dawson says he is willing to assist Ruben Selles in whatever way he can to help Hull City stave off the threat of relegation. The City legend will remain on Selles' coaching staff, with James Oliver-Pearce coming in as his assistant manager.

arts.ttl: Two suitors ready to make attempts to sign Hull City attacker – Player keen on transfer
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Hull City attacker Abdülkadir Ömür could be heading back to the Super Lig. The former Trabzonspor player only joined the Championship side during the last winter transfer window but could look to jump ship following their woes this season. arts.ttl: Hull City owner in furious snap back over match-fixing suggestions – Calls Turkish rivals ‘clowns’
arts.sum: Hull City owner Acun Ilıcalı has lashed out at Galatasaray vice president Metin Öztürk over match-fixing suggestions. The Hull City chairman is also actively involved at Fenerbahçe as their vice president and the Yellow Canaries official didn’t hold back when criticising his Galatasaray counterpart. arts.ttl: Seven Hull City players who could flourish under Ruben Selles after Tim Walter struggles
arts.sum: Unfortunately, Giles was another player City were unable to get the best out of under Walter following a summer of speculation about his future amid firm interest from Middlesbrough. City, though, need all the help they can get on the flanks given Mohamed Belloumi and Liam Millar are both out for the season, leaving Selles with Abu Kamara and Ryan Longman as his two frontline wingers, but Jarvis can have a part to play.
